creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Larry Rosenman from comment #11)
> It actually does work.  (both the 13 and 12 images).
> 
> What does *NOT* work is trying to use OSLOGIN, but that's a different port 
> (sysutils/google-compute-engine-oslogin) and needs someone with google
> compute engine foo to debug THAT, but the images both allow login with
> standard ssh keys in the metadata.

I see what you mean now.

*Sigh*

So, yes, this can indeed be closed, which I will do as part of this update.

Regardless, thank you for your help in figuring out what was not working correctly.
